headline: Trump Hosts Brutal UFC Fights at White House for 80th Birthday
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Donald Trump will head to France for what will likely be contentious discussions with world leaders this week, but first he’ll celebrate his 80th birthday by watching a sport that’s more brutal and bloody than politics.
